query: check engine light is on and misfiring
engine feels rough and jerks a bit at idle
temperature gauge is way up in the red zone
steam is coming out from under the hood
brakes make a high pitched squeal when I stop
brake pedal feels like it's sinking toward the floor
car won't crank at all when I turn the key
headlights get noticeably dim especially at idle
RPM rises but the car doesn't actually speed up, gears feel like they're slipping
one of my tires is wearing down unevenly on the inside edge
my EV is charging much slower than it used to
the range estimate has dropped a lot recently
the car won't start charging at all when I plug it in
